text: The first scene fills me with a sense of anticipation—an empty, glass-walled space, its sterility matched only by the faint echo of fluorescent lights above. The quiet is thick, almost clinical, awaiting purpose or people to animate it. In the second scene, the colorful wall marked 'R+D' sparks curiosity. Its description of a Responsive and rapidly developing space gives me hope; the playful colors and interactive displays suggest innovation and collaboration. Yet, in both places, I feel like an observer on the cusp of participation, caught between detachment and expectation—a philosopher watching the world organize itself, waiting for the meaning to unfold.
